subject: Research Internship at IIT Delhi — Summer 2025
body: We are offering research internships in the areas of Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and NLP. Duration: May to July 2025. Stipend: Rs 15,000/month. Apply with your CV and a 500-word SOP by April 10, 2025.

attachment_texts.internship_details.pdf: The internship will involve working on real research problems under faculty supervision. Students from top engineering colleges preferred. CGPA above 8.0 required. Submit your application at the portal.
